title: Agent Registry + Auto-Dispatch: sub-agent orchestration via agent tool
description: Add Agent Registry and auto-dispatch mechanism to spec-graph. Different pipeline stages automatically select specialized sub-agents (pm/architect/developer/reviewer/qa) that work independently via the agent tool. Each sub-agent gets isolated context (only relevant artifacts), its own system prompt, and communicates through artifacts. No new kernel primitives needed — extends Work-unit with executor field, adds AgentDecl type, and pack.yaml agents/agent_bindings declarations. Inspired by superpowers subagent-driven-development, BMAD role-based agents, and gstack multi-review pipeline.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed with agent bindings
agent registry types + foundation agents + ddd domain agents + dispatch protocol + 5 compose tests. 345/345 tests pass
